scene_input.scene_summary: The people of Makkah react strongly to the Prophet's call for change, with some mocking and others threatening.
scene_input.key_visual_action: A person mocking the Prophet, while another person in the background is shown threatening him with a scowl.

schema_output.scene_summary: The people of Makkah react strongly to the Prophet's call for change, with some mocking and others threatening.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 59
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of remaining calm in the face of adversity and the consequences of mocking and threatening those who speak truth.

characters.name: A Mocking Individual
characters.appearance: medium build, wearing a tattered and worn-out off-white thobe with a brown woolen cloak, and a cloth head covering, mocking the Prophet with a scornful expression

characters.name: A Threatening Individual
characters.appearance: stocky build, wearing a loose-fitting brown thobe and a plain black woolen cloak, scowling and making a threatening gesture in the background

schema_output.narrative_text: The people of Makkah were not happy with the Prophet's message of change. Some laughed and made fun of him, while others threatened him with harm.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A bustling city square in 7th century Makkah with unpainted mud-brick buildings in warm earth tones and a packed-earth floor. Late afternoon golden sunlight casts long shadows across the square. A group of people, some in off-white thobes and brown woolen cloaks, and others in loose-fitting brown thobes and plain black woolen cloaks, gather in a semi-circle. On the left, a person seen entirely from behind: medium build, wearing a tattered and worn-out off-white thobe with a brown woolen cloak, and a cloth head covering, mockingly gestures towards the central figure, who is not present in the scene. In the background, a stocky individual seen from behind: wearing a loose-fitting brown thobe and a plain black woolen cloak, scowls and makes a threatening gesture. Soft warm golden light, vibrant and lively mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with earthy tones as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
